data.body: CHECKPOINT 3/6: Test file created at tests/scripts/test-scan-config-keys.sh, made executable. Creates mktemp -d fixture with 4 files: caller-a.sh (read-config.sh call), caller-b.sh (_read_config_key call), caller-c.sh (inline grep), .claude/dso-config.conf (2 keys), CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md (1 documented key).
